title: Liberty
description: Secure the Blessings of Liberty (U.S. Constitution, Preamble)

questions.title: How important is individual freedom to you?
questions.body: How important is individual freedom to you?

deeperDives.title: Hate speech should be protected as free expression
deeperDives.body: Consider where you draw the line between protecting speech and preventing harm.

deeperDives.title: Deliberate lies for personal gain should be protected as speech
deeperDives.body: Consider whether potential harms might justify limits on this freedom.

deeperDives.title: Political lies should receive special protection during elections
deeperDives.body: Consider whether rules should differ for politicians, campaigns, and ordinary citizens.

deeperDives.title: Government regulation is the best approach to combat online misinformation
deeperDives.body: Consider alternative approaches: platform rules, media literacy programs, or minimal intervention.

deeperDives.title: Preventing harm justifies restricting some forms of speech
deeperDives.body: Consider what types of speech might cross the line and require restriction.

questions.title: How important is the right to personal choice without government interference?
questions.body: How important is the right to personal choice without government interference?

deeperDives.title: Personal choice should be absolute regardless of potential harm to self
deeperDives.body: Consider whether individuals should be free to make choices that may harm themselves.

deeperDives.title: Government should protect individuals from their own harmful choices
deeperDives.body: Consider whether the state has a duty to prevent people from making self-destructive decisions.

questions.title: How important is economic freedom and independence for individuals?
questions.body: How important is economic freedom and independence for individuals?

questions.title: How important is the protection of personal rights and privacy?
questions.body: How important is the protection of personal rights and privacy?
